canvas-white.$description: Canvas White — Page background, card surfaces, ghost button fill — the primary stage everything else sits on

graphite-ink.$description: Graphite Ink — Primary text, link color, icon strokes, hairline borders, ghost button borders — a warm near-black that carries 97% of all typographic weight

deep-carbon.$description: Deep Carbon — Accent text, nav strokes, strong card borders — slightly cooler and harder than Graphite Ink, reserved for moments of maximum contrast

ash-veil.$description: Ash Veil — Muted body backgrounds, soft borders — a warm gray used for secondary surface bands beneath the main canvas

apricot-wash.$description: Apricot Wash — Card backgrounds and borders — the dominant chromatic accent, used as a warm fill or hairline outline on featured cards

iris-mist.$description: Iris Mist — Card backgrounds and borders — cool lavender counterpoint to Apricot Wash, pairs with peach on portfolio or feature cards

fuchsia-bloom.$description: Fuchsia Bloom — Card backgrounds — a vivid pink fill, the most saturated color in the system, appears as a solid block rather than a border

polar-blue.$description: Polar Blue — Soft surface tint — pale sky blue used as a rare secondary card or section background, cooling the warm peach/lavender/pink palette

instrument-sans.$description: The only typeface. Used for every UI element, every headline, every caption. Weight 400 is default body and display; weight 500 sparingly for nav labels and emphasis. The signature move: Instrument Sans is a humanist geometric grotesque with optical corrections — paired with aggressive negative tracking at display sizes, it produces tight, modern, almost couture typography that reads as editorial, not SaaS.

canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Default page background — the dominant surface occupying most of the viewport

ash-band.$description: Surface level 1: Soft warm-gray section background used as a quiet band beneath the main canvas

polar-blue-field.$description: Surface level 2: Cool pale-blue surface tint, used as a full-bleed section background for variety

apricot-field.$description: Surface level 3: Warm peach card fill — marks a single highlighted card per section

fuchsia-field.$description: Surface level 4: Vivid pink card fill — the most saturated surface, used as a singular accent block
